_comment: Single source of truth for the Trivial/Standard/Major tier classification. Rendered by scripts/gen-tier-table.sh into three surfaces: skills/intake-code-contribution/SKILL.md Step 0 (full table), skills/start-thin-slice/SKILL.md Step 5 (routing table), agents/principal-engineer.agent.md (terse bullets). Edit THIS file, not the generated blocks â€” they are overwritten on the next --write and checked in CI via --check.

tiers.name: Trivial
tiers.criteria: â‰¤ ~20 LOC, single capability, no public contract change, no new dependency, no behavior change. Examples: typo, log-line fix, dependency bump, internal rename.
tiers.steps_required: Step 4 (current code touchpoints) and Step 5 (test posture: green-baseline) only.
tiers.phased_workflow_path: Implementer mode (minimal â€” skip design package + full TDD ritual; existing layout is the design) â†’ reviewer mode. No sprint.
tiers.routing_detailed: â†’ `intake-code-contribution` (abbreviated envelope) â†’ `implement-with-defensive-patterns` (implementer mode, minimal ceremony) â†’ `verify-and-assemble-pr` (reviewer mode). No sprint.
tiers.agent_bullet: implementer mode (minimal ceremony â€” no design package; the existing capability layout is the design; confirm green baseline) â†’ reviewer mode. No sprint.

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.criteria: Within an existing capability and an active thin-slice; no new capability, no new ADR-level decision; existing wave specs cover the intent.
tiers.steps_required: Steps 1-6. Skip Step 2 if wave specs are already current.
tiers.phased_workflow_path: Skip architect mode. `implement-with-defensive-patterns` â†’ reviewer mode.
tiers.routing_detailed: â†’ `create-sprint` (seed the Risk register from Step 4) â†’ **wait for the Sprint Plan Approval line to be signed** â†’ `intake-code-contribution` â†’ `implement-with-defensive-patterns` â†’ `verify-and-assemble-pr`.
tiers.agent_bullet: implementer mode â†’ reviewer mode. Existing wave specs are the design package.

tiers.name: Major
tiers.criteria: New capability; new external dependency; public contract change; cross-cutting trade-off; any change that should produce an ADR.
tiers.steps_required: All steps 1-6, including a refreshed Ambiguity Log and architect mode design package.
tiers.phased_workflow_path: Architect mode (Phases 1â€“4) â†’ `create-sprint` (plan informed by the Design Package) â†’ mechanical Design Approval â†’ implementer mode â†’ reviewer mode.
tiers.routing_detailed: â†’ `discovery-and-ambiguity-log` â†’ `design-system-architecture` â†’ `design-capability-layout` â†’ `create-adr` (ADR â†’ `status: Accepted`) â†’ `create-sprint` (implementation plan informed by the Design Package; the sprint carries both the Sprint Plan Approval and Design Approval lines) â†’ wait for **mechanical Design Approval** (ADR `status: Accepted` + signed Design Approval line) **and Sprint Plan Approval** â†’ `intake-code-contribution` â†’ `implement-with-defensive-patterns` â†’ `verify-and-assemble-pr`.
tiers.agent_bullet: architect mode (Phases 1â€“4) â†’ mechanical Design Approval â†’ implementer mode â†’ reviewer mode.
